name: apple-mail
description: Compose and send email through the local macOS Apple Mail app.

interface.shortDescription: Draft and send messages using macOS Mail
interface.longDescription: Use Apple Mail to create visible drafts or send messages from the local macOS Mail app through AppleScript automation. Direct sending requires an explicit confirmation argument.
defaultPrompt: Draft an email in Apple Mail.
Send this message through Apple Mail.
Create a Mail draft for review.
